title: Musée de Beaux Arts & Landscape with the Fall of Icarus

passage.text:
**According to Greek mythology, Icarus was imprisoned with his father Daedalus, a great inventor. Daedalus made wings from feathers and wax, and they used the wings to escape. But Icarus flew too close to the sun, and his wings melted. He fell into the ocean and drowned.**

##Musée des Beaux Arts

*By W.H. Auden*

About suffering they were never wrong,  
The [word]: how well they understood  
Its human position; how it takes place  
While someone else is eating or opening a window or just walking dully along:  

How, when the aged are [word], passionately waiting  
For the miraculous birth, there always must be  
Children who did not specially want it to happen, skating  
On a pond at the edge of the wood:  
They never forgot  
That even the dreadful [word] must run its course  
Anyhow in a corner, some untidy spot  
Where the dogs go on with their doggy life and the torturer's horse  
Scratches its innocent behind on a tree.  

In Brueghel's *Icarus*, for instance: how everything turns away  
Quite __leisurely__ from the disaster; the [word] may  
Have heard the splash, the [word] cry,  
But for him it was not an important failure; the sun shone  
As it had to on the white legs disappearing into the green  
Water; and the expensive delicate ship that must have seen  
Something amazing, a boy falling out of the sky,  
Had somewhere to get to and sailed calmly on.  

___

##Landscape with the Fall of Icarus

*By William Carlos Williams*

According to Brueghel  
when Icarus fell  
it was spring  

a farmer was ploughing  
his field  
the whole [word]    

of the year was  
awake tingling  
near  

the edge of the sea  
concerned  
with itself  

sweating in the sun  
that melted  
the wings' wax  

unsignificantly  
off the coast  
there was  

a splash quite unnoticed  
this was  
Icarus drowning

questions.question_content: **What is the best meaning of the word *leisurely*, as it is used in stanza 3 of “Musée des Beaux Arts”?**

choices.label: B
choices.content: in a relaxed and unhurried way

choices.label: D
choices.content: in a terrified and frantic way

note: KA serves 1/4 questions to anonymous users. Passage and sample question captured for skeleton generation.
